prompt: Refine this Aevum brand logomark (reference image), keeping the SAME premium style: a continuous twisting ribbon in San Marino blue (#4D6E9E) graduating into near-black navy with a fine silver metallic edge, on a pure solid WHITE background, centered. Keep the elegant infinity (∞) knot at the base. CHANGE: make the overall silhouette read more clearly as an elegant capital letter 'A' rising from the infinity knot — a confident peak with two legs — while staying ornate and sculptural. Balanced, symmetrical, sophisticated, distinctive. ICON ONLY, NO text, NO wordmark.

Iterate on this Aevum ribbon logomark (reference), same premium look — glossy ribbon, San Marino blue (#4D6E9E) to navy gradient, slim silver edge, pure WHITE background, centered. Make it PERFECTLY SYMMETRICAL left-to-right: a graceful capital 'A' formed by two mirror-image ribbon strands that interlace once in the middle and resolve into a clean horizontal infinity (∞) loop at the base. Slightly simpler, fewer crossings, more legible, still luxurious and eternal. ICON ONLY, NO text, NO wordmark.

Another refinement of this Aevum mark (reference), same premium ribbon aesthetic: San Marino blue (#4D6E9E) into navy, fine silver metallic edge highlight, pure WHITE background, centered. Keep the eternal-knot feeling but make it cleaner and more iconic — a tall elegant 'A' silhouette from a single endless folded ribbon, infinity (∞) woven at the base, generous negative space inside the A counter. Refined, high-end pharma/biotech, distinctive and memorable. ICON ONLY, NO text, NO wordmark.

Variation of this Aevum ribbon logomark (reference), SAME composition and premium style — twisting ribbon, San Marino blue (#4D6E9E) to navy, silver edge, pure WHITE background, centered, infinity knot at base forming a capital 'A'. CHANGE: tighten and refine the curves to feel more geometric and intentional (golden-ratio balance), crisper folds, slightly bolder ribbon. Keep it sculptural and ornate but more controlled and brand-ready. ICON ONLY, NO text, NO wordmark.

Flat brand-icon version of this Aevum ribbon logomark (reference) — keep the EXACT same shape and composition (a capital 'A' of interlacing ribbon resolving into an infinity knot at the base) but render it as a clean FLAT two-tone vector: San Marino blue (#4D6E9E) and near-black navy with thin negative-space gaps marking the ribbon overlaps, NO 3D, NO gradient, NO metallic. Pure solid WHITE background, centered. Must stay legible and elegant when small. ICON ONLY, NO text, NO wordmark.

Premium hero refinement of this Aevum logomark (reference), same look elevated: a luxurious twisting ribbon capital 'A' rising from an infinity (∞) knot, San Marino blue (#4D6E9E) flowing into deep navy, polished silver-chrome edge, soft dimensional sheen, pure solid WHITE background, centered. Richer depth and craftsmanship, jewelry-grade, sophisticated, distinctive and unmistakable. ICON ONLY, NO text, NO wordmark.
